contents_preview: I have some news to share. Nightwater is part of Steam Next Fest June 2026, running now through June 22. title: Steam Next Fest Announcement & Incremental Dev Friends!
contents_preview: Hi everyone, I’m excited to announce that Nightwater will be part of Steam Next Fest: June 2026! Next Fest runs from June 15 to June 22. title: The Nightwater Demo is Out Now!
contents_preview: The Nightwater demo is now live on Steam.In the demo, you can explore the full first biome, play the first minigame in full, and also get a preview of the second biome and second minigame.The demo takes around 1 hour to reach the end, or around 4 hours if you want to explore everything currently ava

title: Demo Release Date - May 8, 2026
contents_preview: The Nightwater demo will be released on May 8, 2026!The demo includes the first area, “The Woods,” with all milestone items and unlocks, as well as the first minigame, “Dark Thicket,” with the full progression and unlocks! title: Nightwater Official Playtest
contents_preview: Nightwater's first public Steam Playtest is here! The focus of this test is to validate the core loop and the overall pacing. title: Nightwater looks like a curious blend of secrets, exploration, crafting and automation
contents_preview: One to stick into your list to keep an eye on is Nightwater, an open world exploration game that mixes in crafting and automation in a strange world.
